name: Startup Format Guard
description: Reinforces configurable reply-format rules with prompt-time guidance plus a hardened outgoing rewrite fallback and clearer body-section formatting.

targetChannels.description: Only inject guidance for these channel ids. Empty means all channels.

applyOnFirstTurnOnly.description: Only enforce guidance on early turns.

initialMessageCountMax.description: Maximum prepared message count that still counts as an early turn.

enforceOutgoingMessages.description: Rewrite flat assistant text into the house format before write/send when enforcement is active.

plainModeEscapeWords.description: If the current prompt contains one of these phrases, the plugin will skip both guidance injection and rewrite fallback.

requiredOpening.description: Required opening rule for the reply.

requiredTakeaway.description: Required takeaway rule placed near the top.

listRule.description: Rule for when to use bullets or numbering.

disallowedPatterns.description: List of reply patterns to explicitly avoid.

guidanceTitle.description: Heading used inside the injected system guidance.

customGuidance.description: If provided, overrides the generated guidance body completely.
